name: Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1 cup lemon juice or 1/2 lemon and 1/2 apple vinegar
6 pounds fajita meat (skirt, sirloin, flank steak)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except meat in a bowl and mix well.
2. Add the meat to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 24 hours, turning the mixture at least 4 or 6 times for best results.
3. When ready to cook, barbecue over mesquite coals until cooked through for 5 to 8 minutes on each side. For best results, aim for a medium-rare doneness.
4. Remove the meat to a cutting board and slice into half-inch strips across the grain.
5. Use any remaining marinade to baste while cooking.
